context: 定语从句 who 训练
userText: I know that develper who fixes the bug; people who studies every day improve faster.
correctedText: I know the developer who fixed the bug. People who study every day improve faster.
generalAdvice: who 结构已经能识别，但要把动词形式锁死：can 后用原形，people 后用 study，具体过去动作优先用 fixed/wrote。

issues.note: 把已经完成的具体动作写成现在时，例如 fixes the bug，而目标意思是 fixed the bug。
issues.suggestion: 表达一个具体已经发生的动作时，优先检查是否需要过去式：fixed, wrote, reported。

issues.note: people 是复数，后面的动词不能加第三人称单数 -s，例如应为 people who study。
issues.suggestion: 看到 people who ... 时，把 who 后面的动词按复数处理：people who study/work/practice。

issues.note: developer 拼写不稳定，写成了 develper。
issues.suggestion: 技术身份词反复写准：developer, engineer, customer, teammate。
